game_info.title: Flow Connect
game_info.concept:
Flow Free® is a simple yet addictive puzzle game.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flow-free/id526641427

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Flow Free® is a simple yet addictive puzzle game.

Connect matching colors with pipe to create a Flow®. Pair all colors, and cover the entire board to solve each puzzle. But watch out, pipes will break if they cross or overlap!

Free play through hundreds of levels, or race against the clock in Time Trial mode. Gameplay ranges from simple and relaxed, to challenging and frenetic, and everywhere in between. How you play is up to you. So, give Flow Free a try, and experience "mind like water"!

*** Flow Free features ***

* Content
- Over 2,500 free levels available in Free Play mode, and new Daily Puzzles every day!
- 10 different board sizes
- Free Classic, Bonus, Bridges, Mania, Extreme, and Jumbo level packs
- Additional level packs available for purchase

* Challenge
- Game Center achievements as you solve levels and complete packs
- Track your completion of each level in Free Play mode
- Strive for accuracy in Free Play using the fewest, most efficient moves
- Strive for speed in Time Trial for the most and fastest solves
- 20 scored Time Trial variants to choose from by board size and duration

* Look & Feel
- Smooth, polished touch interaction
- Colorful UI
- Fun sound effects
- Clean vector graphics and animations
- Labels available for color impaired players

Enjoy.
game_info.description: Flow Connect is a logic puzzle game where you must pair all matching colors on the grid with continuous pipes. The goal is to connect every pair of colored dots and fill the entire board with pipes without any overlaps. As you progress, the grids become larger and more complex. Complete the connection for all colors to win the level!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move the cursor around the grid
- Space / Z: Select a dot to start drawing a pipe, or toggle drawing mode
- R: Restart the current level (clear all pipes)
- ESC: Pause / Unpause the game
- Enter: Start game (at menu) or proceed to next level (on win)

TEST_1.test_description: Random input stress test to ensure game stability and error resilience.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will generate random directional inputs (Arrow Keys) and selection inputs (Space) at a high frequency. This simulates erratic player behavior to check for crashes, boundary violations, or logic errors in the pipe connection system.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should continue running at 60 FPS without throwing exceptions. The cursor should stay within bounds, and game state should remain consistent (e.g., pipes shouldn't appear in invalid locations).

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition verification by executing the known solution for the procedurally generated level.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The level generator stores the solution path used to create the level. The test controller will read this solution and systematically move the cursor to each color's starting dot, activate drawing, trace the correct path to the endpoint, and complete the connection for all colors.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should recognize each completed connection. Once all paths are drawn and the board is filled, the game state should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN immediately.
